scripts.test:e2e: rm -f e2e/.cleanup-done && npx -p playwright-bdd bddgen && npx playwright test --grep-invert @slow; rm -f e2e/.cleanup-done
scripts.test:e2e:slow: rm -f e2e/.cleanup-done && npx -p playwright-bdd bddgen && npx playwright test; rm -f e2e/.cleanup-done
scripts.test:e2e:ui: npx -p playwright-bdd bddgen && npx playwright test --ui
scripts.test:e2e:headed: npx -p playwright-bdd bddgen && npx playwright test --headed --grep-invert @slow
